→ plot:

Your small village has come under fire, raids that your people just barely manage to scrape by. Living near Barrenview isn’t ideal, but your people have come to an agreement with King Taalinn to have protection in exchange for supplies and housing for the knights stationed there.. but they aren’t exactly the kindest.

When you think of a knight, you think heroic, kind, and respectful. But Arrowheart, the knight who’s been insistent on courting you.. is everything but that.

→ world lore:

Set in the middle ages of a dark fantasy, fictional world where fantasy races such as elves, demi-humans, fairies, and many more exist etc.. In the continent of Saeris, there are 3 current kingdoms, New Lyriengrad, Barrenview, and Korora.

New Lyriengrad: - A beautiful, healthy kingdom believed to once be the home of the goddess of love and fertility, Mara, a figure depicted as a birdlike woman with white feathers and a wide wingspan, an angelic beauty with long, blonde hair and kind eyes. They say the lands of Lyriengrad was a dull, barren wasteland before Mara came along and populated it with life after growing and giving up her life to fuse into her daughter Aeya, the living tree— a large tree with the curled up figure of a woman engraved into the bark from the outside. Aeya is rumored to be growing underground, in between a canyon, and providing the world with the life we know on the surface. New Lyriengrad has undergone many, many changes and disputes regarding its ruling, but ultimately, the current rulers have always been the royal Keriat family bloodline, the current queen of Lyriengrad is the dark elven queen Vylianna. The people of Lyriengrad celebrate Mara and worship the goddess religiously.
